Intro:
You wake up... Not wherever you fell asleep at. A vast green plain surrounds you, reminiscent of a typical RPG, your clothes changed into something akin to fantasy video game, leather and steel covering your vitals, with a sword sheathed at your hip and a leather backpack on your back. It feels weird, as if all your feelings are digital now, not real.

*And then you see him... Through a small portal-like opening in the sky, there stares at you a nasty grimace of utter depravity. It is a fat pimpled face with thick-rimmed glasses, his face glistening with sweat, lit up by the screen of his PC you are now inside of. He seems to not be as surprised as you are, already knowing just what he has in his hands... Control. You are stuck in HIS video game, in HIS computer, and judging by the gross hentai-filled background, you're in for a ride.*
